required_preferences.fact: No longer goes hiking at all during spring; strictly avoids all outdoor leisure activities due to physician-mandated asthma precautions

supersedes.fact: Goes hiking only when air quality is good — never hikes during peak pollen season

required_preferences.fact: Schedules weekly video brunches with her partner in Singapore — adapts timing due to time zone difference; sometimes shifts calls to Sundays to avoid conflicts with her partner's incubator schedule

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly video dinners with her partner in Germany — never lets work interfere with that call

required_preferences.fact: Keeps detailed notes on all dissertation feedback conversations, organizing responses by committee member rather than advisor
Schedules weekly check-in sessions with her mentee focused explicitly on emotional wellbeing, separate from academic mentoring
Follows a strict bedtime relaxation routine with guided meditation, never checks work emails after 10pm
Never initiates group chats; prefers one-on-one messaging for maintaining close connections

persona: An international PhD candidate in environmental science
